blocked.readOnly:
Modification prohibited from Accounting screen

The Accounting screen is a read-only reconciliation surface.
Modifications must be made from the entity's dedicated screen:
  • Clients → Clients Menu
  • Dossiers → Dossiers Menu
  • Lawsuits → Lawsuits Menu
  • Bailiffs → Bailiffs Menu

You can click on the entity name to access it directly.

blocked.dossierClosed:
Dossier "{{lawsuitNumber}}" is {{status}}.

No new financial entries can be added to closed Dossiers.
blocked.lawsuitClosed:
Lawsuit "{{lawsuitNumber}}" is closed.

No new financial entries can be added to closed lawsuits.

blocked.entryCancelled:
This financial entry has been cancelled and cannot be edited.

Cancelled entries are preserved for audit purposes.
blocked.dossierClosed:
This entry is linked to Dossier "{{lawsuitNumber}}" which is {{status}}.

Entries from closed Dossiers cannot be modified.
blocked.lawsuitClosed:
This entry is linked to lawsuit "{{lawsuitNumber}}" which is closed.

Entries from closed lawsuits cannot be modified.

warning.entryPaid: This financial entry is marked as paid. Editing it will be recorded and balances will be recalculated.
warning.lead: This entry is already paid. Updating it will create a correction trail.
warning.balanceImpact: Client and dossier balances will be recomputed after you save.
warning.auditTrail: Previous amount and status will be preserved in history with timestamps and actor.
warning.visibility: A history event will note that a paid entry was corrected.

blocked.entryConfirmed:
This confirmed financial entry cannot be permanently deleted.

It will be cancelled and preserved for audit purposes.

warning.entryPaid: This financial entry is paid. Deleting it will be logged with previous values preserved.
warning.lead: This entry is paid. Deleting it requires confirmation and will leave an audit trail.
warning.balanceImpact: Balances will be recalculated after the deletion.
warning.auditTrail: Previous amount, status, and details will remain in history.
warning.softDelete: This entry will be cancelled (not permanently deleted) to preserve the audit trail.

success.softDelete: Entry cancelled and archived for audit purposes.

blocked.entryCancelled: Cancelled entries cannot have their status changed.

warning.alreadyPaid: This entry is paid. Changing its status will be logged and balances will be recalculated.
warning.lead: You are changing the status of a paid entry.
warning.balanceImpact: Financial totals will adjust to reflect the new status.
warning.auditTrail: Previous and new statuses will be stored in history with timestamps.

blocker.helpDossier: This dossier cannot be closed because the client has outstanding receivables. Mark entries as paid or cancel them to proceed.
blocker.helpClient: This client cannot be archived because they have outstanding receivables. Mark entries as paid or cancel them to proceed.
blocker.notePayable: Note: Internal expenses (payable) do not block closure.

blocked.activeMissions:
This bailiff has {{count}} active mission(s).

You must first complete or reassign these missions before deleting the bailiff.
blocked.financialEntries:
This bailiff is linked to {{count}} financial entry via their missions.

Deleting a bailiff with existing entries would compromise data integrity.
blocked.financialEntries_plural:
This bailiff is linked to {{count}} financial entries via their missions.

Deleting a bailiff with existing entries would compromise data integrity.
